files_modified.purpose: Migrated from LaTeX-based release to Typst matrix build with typst-community/setup-typst@v5

commit_subject: feat(T003): migrate release workflow to Typst with matrix build strategy
commit_body: Replaced xu-cheng/latex-action@v3 steps with typst-community/setup-typst@v5 and matrix strategy covering all 4 entry points (cv.typ, cv_embedded.typ, cv_enterprise.typ, cover_letter.typ). Tag trigger narrowed to v*.*.* only. Added font installation step for custom Roboto/FontAwesome fonts. Version extraction simplified (calver logic removed). fail-fast: false ensures all matrix jobs report independently.

validation.command: grep 'typst-community/setup-typst@v5' .github/workflows/release.yml && grep 'cv\.typ' .github/workflows/release.yml && grep 'v\*\.\*\.\*' .github/workflows/release.yml && grep 'fail-fast: false' .github/workflows/release.yml && grep 'cover_letter.typ' .github/workflows/release.yml
validation.summary: All verification patterns matched: setup-typst@v5, cv.typ, v*.*.* tag filter, fail-fast: false, and all 4 entry points

reasoning.approach: Full rewrite of release.yml from single-job LaTeX pipeline to two-job Typst pipeline with build matrix + release job

key_decisions.decision: Separate build and release jobs instead of inline matrix
key_decisions.rationale: Matrix+release in a single job would create N releases; separating allows one release with all artifacts collected from matrix builds

key_decisions.decision: Use actions/upload-artifact + download-artifact for artifact sharing
key_decisions.rationale: Standard pattern for sharing artifacts across matrix jobs to a downstream release job. merge-multiple: true simplifies file references

key_decisions.decision: Copy fonts/ directory to ~/.fonts/ with fc-cache
key_decisions.rationale: Mitigates RSK-002 (missing custom fonts on Ubuntu runner). Typst relies on fontconfig cache so fc-cache is required after installing fonts

key_decisions.decision: Narrowed tag trigger from v* + calver to v*.*.* only
key_decisions.rationale: Per HITL decision — only strict semver tags (v1.2.3) should trigger releases. Removed calver pattern [0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9].[0-9][0-9]*
